title: Optimized gear
description: Modpack aimed at lightness and speed
body:
## Lightness 

It only weighs:

| Modpack Version | Weight |Difference
|----------|----------|----------|
| 1    | 112.86KiB  |0
|2|112.85KiB|-0.01|
|3-beta|14.67KiB|-98.2|
|3-beta.1|14.81KiB|+0.14|
## Simplicity

Not overloaded with unnecessary mods

## Quick Updates

It can quickly switch to new versions
